ai_summary: This document certifies that BSE Limited has successfully complied with Regulation 74(5) of SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018 for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, regarding details of securities dematerialized/rematerialized. Their Registrar and Transfer Agent, KFin Technologies Limited, certified this compliance to relevant stock exchanges and depositories, indicating adherence to regulatory requirements. There are no red flags or material negative impacts identified in this routine regulatory filing, signaling robust operational governance.
